summary: ARS 1000 Shade Score Integration Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Backend shade-score endpoint returns 100/100 for test PDC (Bamba Ibrahim) with full conformity. Carbon score simulate accepts shade_score_ars1000 parameter with coefficient 0.30 and max bonus 1.0 pts. Decomposition includes 'Bonus Ombrage ARS 1000' criterion. Frontend PDC Fiche 3 displays real-time shade score panel with density/diversity/strata progress bars, conformity badge, and prime impact in FCFA. AgentProgressPage correctly shows 7/7 form tracking (added PDC + REDD).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend carbon_score_engine.py: calculate_shade_score_ars1000 correctly implements ARS 1000 formula (density 40pts, diversity 30pts, strata 30pts)
Backend carbon_score_engine.py: calculate_carbon_score integrates shade bonus with coefficient 0.30 and max 1.0 pts
Backend pdc_v2.py: GET /{pdc_id}/shade-score endpoint correctly extracts tree data from fiche2.arbres + carte_parcelle.arbres_ombrage
Backend ici_data_collection.py: check_and_update_farmer_completion now checks 7 forms (ici, ssrte, parcels, photos, pdc, redd, register)
Backend cooperative_agents.py: agents-progress returns 7 forms per farmer with correct tracking
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: computeShadeScore function correctly calculates client-side shade score for offline-first experience
Frontend PDCStepperPage.jsx: renderFiche3 displays shade score panel with progress bars, conformity badge, and prime impact
Frontend AgentProgressPage.jsx: FORM_LABELS updated to include 'PDC' and 'REDD+' labels
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test PDC 69da80390d8a87a393fd1ede (Bamba Ibrahim)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 shade score integration fully tested. Test PDC (Bamba Ibrahim, ID: 69da80390d8a87a393fd1ede) has 13 trees, 11 species, strate 3 present, ombrage='dense', superficie 0.5ha. Shade score is 100/100 Conforme ARS 1000. Carbon score simulate accepts shade_score_ars1000 parameter. AgentProgressPage now tracks 7 forms (register, pdc, ici, ssrte, redd, parcels, photos).

features: Score Ombrage ARS 1000 header with score/100
Density progress bar (X arbres/ha) - 40 pts max
